findings.evidence: `rg -n "elementaryTwoQuotient(Map|Congr)" TauCeti` shows only the defs and `_mk`/`_symm_mk` lemmas at lines 172,195,202,214,219 and class wrappers at `NumberTheory/ClassGroup/ElementaryTwoQuotient.lean:113,120,131`; no identity/composition transport lemmas are provided.
findings.fix: Add and annotate the functorial API, e.g. `@[simp] elementaryTwoQuotientMap_id`, `elementaryTwoQuotientMap_comp`, `@[simp] elementaryTwoQuotientCongr_refl`, `elementaryTwoQuotientCongr_trans`, and class-group wrapper versions where the wrapper names are expected.
findings.issue: `elementaryTwoQuotientMap`/`elementaryTwoQuotientCongr` only expose the action on generators; there are no public `id`/`comp` or `refl`/`trans` lemmas, so downstream genus-field code cannot normalize chains of canonical class-group isomorphisms by `simp`/`rw`.

summary: The transport declarations expose a functorial construction but omit the functorial characteristic API needed to compose canonical class-group identifications without re-proving quotient-surjectivity arguments.
